scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:5000 && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.verify: node --check backend/server.js && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
